1.title: Max/MSP Patches, Performances, & Sound Design
1.desc: My work on the DSP/ML/Mathematical side of music, primarily using Max/MSP to create sounds, sequencers, and algorithmic sounds. I'm also exploring + documenting physical synthesis, Ableton techniques (plugins + M4L), and other technologies like SuperCollider and PureData.

2.title: Conversational Behavior Reasoning in Full-Duplex Speech
2.desc: A framework that enables reasoning over conversational behaviors by modeling this process as causal inference within a Graph-of-Thought (GoT).

3.title: Modal Improvisation (Instrument)
3.desc: Real-time MIDI functionality for a performance-ready instrument, built entirely in Max. Synth pad created from scratch using multichannel harmonics and versatile comb filtering.

4.title: AlumniDB
4.desc: Service to connect students with alumni, fostering meaningful connections between curious learners and insightful mentors.

5.title: 3-Stage Audio Amplifier
5.desc: 5.5x gain amplifier (2.4% THD) with a filter, gain, and output stage. Designed & tested in LTSpice and brought to life with spare parts.

6.title: Chord Structure Analyzer
6.desc: An algorithm in Python with music21 to process chord changes given a MusicXML file and analyze them, structurally, for real-time practice.
